title: Session Persistence Flow
interaction_flow: [guard] raises UserError if session combined with conversation_id / previous_response_id / auto_previous_response_id
AgentRunner → session_persistence: prepare_input_with_session(raw_input, session, session_input_callback, session_settings)
session_persistence: normalize + deduplicate history + new_input → (prepared_input, items_to_persist)
session_persistence: classify combined items into appended (new) vs history sets
[persist user input items for this turn before model call]
=== PATH A: NextStepRunAgain (tool calls, more turns needed) ===
AgentRunner → agent_runner_helpers: save_turn_items_if_needed(session, run_state, session_persistence_enabled, input_guardrail_results, items, response_id)
agent_runner_helpers → session_persistence: save_result_to_session(session, [], items, run_state, response_id)
AgentRunner → agent_runner_helpers: save_turn_items_if_needed(session, run_state, session_persistence_enabled, input_guardrail_results, items, response_id)
agent_runner_helpers → session_persistence: save_result_to_session(session, [], items, run_state, response_id)
AgentRunner → session_persistence: save_result_to_session(session, input_items_for_save, session_items_for_turn(turn_result), run_state)
AgentRunner → agent_runner_helpers: update_run_state_for_interruption(run_state, model_responses, processed_response, generated_items, session_items, current_turn, next_step)
session_persistence: slice new_run_items = new_items[already_persisted:] (dedup retry protection)
session_persistence: convert RunItems → TResponseInputItem via run_item_to_input_item()
AgentRunner → agent_runner_helpers: update_run_state_after_resume(run_state, turn_result, generated_items, session_items)
AgentRunner → session_persistence: save_resumed_turn_items(session, turn_session_items, persisted_count, response_id, reasoning_item_id_policy)
session_persistence → session_persistence: save_result_to_session(session, [], items, None, response_id)
run_loop → session_persistence: save_resumed_turn_items(session, items, persisted_count, response_id)
run_loop → agent_runner_helpers: update_run_state_after_resume(run_state, turn_result, generated_items, streamed_result.new_items)
AgentRunner → session_persistence: persist_session_items_for_guardrail_trip(session, server_conversation_tracker, session_input_items_for_persistence, original_user_input, run_state)
key_relationships: AgentRunner orchestrates all session persistence calls
session_persistence.resumed_turn_items reads from SingleStepResult (pre_step_items, new_step_items, session_step_items)
Session interface: get_items(limit?) → list, add_items(items), run_compaction(args), pop_item() [optional]
OpenAIConversationsSession: special handling — strips id/provider_data fields, ignores ids for fingerprinting
OpenAIResponsesCompactionAwareSession: triggers run_compaction or _defer_compaction after add_items

key_data_types.TResponseInputItem: dict-like input item for model API
key_data_types.RunItem: SDK wrapper for model output (tool_call_output_item, HandoffOutputItem, etc.)
key_data_types.SingleStepResult: fields: pre_step_items, new_step_items, session_step_items, original_input, next_step
key_data_types.ReasoningItemIdPolicy: controls ID handling for reasoning items during serialization

business_rules: Session cannot be combined with conversation_id, previous_response_id, or auto_previous_response_id — mutual exclusion enforced at run start
Already-persisted items are tracked via run_state._current_turn_persisted_item_count to prevent duplicates on streaming retries
Input items (user turn) are persisted BEFORE model call; output items AFTER turn completes
session_input_callback allows custom history merging; output is classified as new vs history to avoid re-persisting old history
Compaction is deferred when local tool outputs are present (to avoid losing tool context); forced once tool outputs are resolved
rewind_session_items provides best-effort rollback via pop_item() on conversation lock retry errors
session_items_for_turn prefers session_step_items over new_step_items when set (allows override of what gets persisted)
important_notes: Two session modes: (1) local Session store — full persistence logic in session_persistence.py; (2) server-managed conversation (OpenAI Responses API) — prepare_input_with_session called with include_history=False, server handles history. save_result_to_session is the central persistence function called from multiple paths (normal turn, resume, guardrail trip, interruption). All functions are async.
